title: Fingers
description: This resource packs adds fingers to your player model!
body:
Hello! I'm Womphey and what I've brought to you today is this thing! *dies\*
This pack adds _f i n g e r s_ to your 🫵 Minecraft character!
Hehehehe 👁️👄👁️

### Requires [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) + [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
(Entity Model Features + Entity Texture Features)
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5785d562f34b7e39ecf7e3fd8805bdaf5d771356.png)

![Slim skins are now compatible :D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7000c762e61e7c491954b76561ec3fa9ac54fb1.png)
(Disclaimer the icon is a lie, the fingers are not animated and they won't do that ._.)
